className: w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center gap-16

src: var a = ctx.animate({ keyframes:{ scale:[1, 1.4, 0.8, 1] }, duration:60 }); ctx.getNode('shorthand').scale(a.scale); var b = ctx.animate({ keyframes:{ rotate:[ {at:0,value:0}, {at:0.5,value:360,easing:'back-out'}, {at:1,value:0} ] }, duration:60 }); ctx.getNode('full').rotate(b.rotate);
